deduplicated_findings.name: Outdated Solidity Version
deduplicated_findings.reasoning: Both findings highlight the use of an outdated Solidity version (0.4.25) and recommend upgrading to a newer version.

deduplicated_findings.name: Timestamp Dependence in isSaleFinished()
deduplicated_findings.reasoning: This finding highlights the use of block.timestamp for time-based logic, which can be manipulated by miners.
